title: VHS Horror Experience
description: Survive the nights with terror waiting for you.
body:
You spawn in the world as you do the regular routine like every Minecraft player, However these unusual things began to appear watching you from the shadows out of sight. You are adventuring out and find them in your world, staring at you. and if you find one Location DO NOT ENCOUNTER THEM They are known to corrupt your world can drive you into madness, Even if your safe in another dimension beware they would find a way to creep you out.

If you aks for fabric then sorry because the main mods for the modpack are only on forge and 1.20.1

IF your a youtuber finding out this modpack leave a link TO THIS modpack.

I will add Ghost hunting like to minecraft like creeping woods, spooky structures, and paranormal activiy mods to the modpack maybe next? or sunday.

On halloween the modpack will have Haunted Harvest, halloween resource pack, and thedefult style halloween pack. so it will end every from October 30th to November 2nd

And I like to clarify I want to add Voice chat and Essentials mod to this modpack but I'm not sure if multiplayer will work with the three mods being the ones below:

 In your World. https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/in-your-world 
 
 ooo.JAR. https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ooo-jar

The Broken Script. [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script-wendigodripofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script-wendigodripofficial)

I made the modpack on curse forge so I'm porting it to modrinth and yes it will be here soon I hope, so for any modrinth people here I made my showcase of the mod here so In your world, eyx sonic, sanity mod was there until the version 2.2 for 1.20.1 cause it was kind of a bit annoying to deal with so this is what I planned 

Heres the modpack if you want to check it out
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/upcoming-horror-modpack-read-description](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/upcoming-horror-modpack-read-description)
the slang is different because I didn't change it

This is the showcase for the modpack so once I get used to modrinth then I can start uploading files for it
